name: A-124-2
subtitle: Wasp Filter (Slim Line)
summary: Slim 4 HP version of the A-124 Wasp filter. A 12 dB multimode filter based on the EDP Wasp synthesizer circuit, which uses digital inverters (CD4069) as op-amps for a characteristically dirty, warm sound. Bandpass and a jumper-selectable LP or HP output alongside the LP/HP mix output. No self-oscillation.
